title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 454.1683 - Applicability
text:
454.1683.  Applicability. — This Article, sections 454.1680 to 454.1716, applies only to a support proceeding under the Convention.  In such a proceeding, if a provision of this Article, sections 454.1680 to 454.1716, is inconsistent with Articles 1 through 6, sections 454.1500 to 454.1677, this article, sections 454.1680 to 454.1716, controls.
(L. 2011 H.B. 260) 
Effective 6-15-16, see § 454.1728
